chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-739 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of MA No.4023/2018. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2025 Mr. Parkash Kumar D.A.G. None present for the petitioners. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Record reflects that this petition was filed in the year 2018 and still pending without any progress. It shows that the petitioners have lost their interest to pursue the petition. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
